title: butea purpurea
intro: Butea purpurea, also known as the Palash or Dhak tree, is a flowering plant native to tropical and subtropical regions of Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Butea purpurea include reducing inflammation and pain, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. In traditional Ayurvedic medicine, Butea purpurea is often prepared as a herbal tea or made into capsules, which are believed to promote overall well-being and longevity.
